textByHash.09beafad964f1a1303bc1d8a4bd04036841c7a33: At the moment Old School Bonds can only be redeemed for membership and for display name changes.
textByHash.34931db61da5600f07f21ce5d78ad9f568f4b01b: Simply click the bond and choose the redeem option.
textByHash.452dadf519637ec88ae004901cdcc707ade2e459: My sources have also informed me that due to popular demand, they can now be redeemed for a free name change! Handy!
textByHash.4f6b9816ac2f0b0df2fb1ea6ff728c23f9af84c9: I'm James. It's my job to tell you all there is to know about Old School Bonds.
textByHash.b4938932454e8305dd310530b928aac183191a56: Open the Bond Pouch from the Controls Settings and follow the instructions to buy a bond. You can then give the bond to another player or sell it on the Grand Exchange.
textByHash.b88c5325389ff3467c99fc4d5e43758ade4ce894: You get 14 days membership from an Old School Bond.
textByHash.b926f716beaac7bf9b2253aefb8e2b6bc1ef44e2: An Old School Bond will allow you to buy membership for your account using in game gold pieces.
textByHash.e7be92ee3dad3e3d511d5d9d6cea2e890afd6935: You can get an Old School Bond from other players or from the Grand Exchange.
